questions.question: Describe the key differences between a full node and a light node in the context of the Ethereum blockchain. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the role of each node type in the Ethereum network

questions.question: What is the purpose of the Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM) and how does it enable the execution of smart contracts on the blockchain? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the EVM's role and how it enables smart contract execution

questions.question: What is the concept of gas in Ethereum, and how does it affect the execution of smart contracts? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the role of gas in limiting the computational resources of smart contracts
